responsibilities: Design and prototype robotic mechanisms and control systems for autonomous mobile platforms operating in unstructured environments
Develop and integrate embedded firmware for motor controllers, sensors, and actuators using C++ and real-time operating systems
Build and tune control loops including PID and model predictive control for precise robotic arm and platform movement
Collaborate with mechanical and electrical engineering teams to integrate sensors, actuators, and compute hardware into robot platforms
Implement and validate kinematic and dynamic models to simulate robot behavior before physical deployment using MATLAB and Simulink
Conduct hardware-in-the-loop testing and field trials to validate robot performance, reliability, and safety under real-world conditions
Architect ROS-based software stacks that coordinate perception, planning, and control modules across distributed robotic subsystems
Debug and optimize embedded code to meet strict latency, power, and memory constraints on resource-limited robotics hardware
Document system architecture, test procedures, and design decisions to support cross-functional collaboration and regulatory compliance
